title: The Modded Furs
description: TMF: A Furry SMP Modpack designed for multiplayer
body:
# About
The Modded Furs is furry gaming group comprised of me and a few friends. This modpack is made for the SMP I'm hosting for this group. Feel Free to use this pack for other purposes if you like the contents of this pack :3

# Whats In The Pack?
Mostly Exploration and Engineering mods such as Terrarium, Create + addons, Computer Craft, and some magic sprinkled in with the Occultism mod. There are also some silly playful mods in there such as Joy of Painting, WaterFrames (video player), simple voicechat, and more.
